title: Phase 9: Renal Performance Clinic (Tier 2/3)
description: Formal SPPB/6MWT assessment protocol. Billing setup (CPT 97750, 97161-63). Cash-pay longevity panel. Staffing. Outcome tracking.
close_reason: Phase 9 complete: Renal Performance Clinic documentation (Tier 2/3 protocols, SPPB/6MWT/TUG assessments, CPT billing codes, printable assessment form)

title: Phase 6: Report Card + Final Card Designs (42 cards)
description: Physical report card 1:1 with digital. All 42 card front/back designs. Print-ready. OCR field mapping. QR codes for education.
close_reason: Phase 6 complete: 42 clinical cards (front+back HTML), card gallery with domain filtering, print-all.html for batch printing, README with full inventory

title: Phase 15: Patient View with Pre-Visit
description: Patient-facing mode with pre-visit data gathering. Visual health indicators (gauges not numbers), 6th grade reading level, pre-visit questionnaire (meds, symptoms, questions). Patient data flows into encounter via MA verification. Mobile-first.

title: AI-Era CKD Note Template - Complete Rebuild
description: Epic: Rebuild TKE CKD clinic note from traditional SmartPhrase to AI-era system. 37 sections, 42 cards, 9 domains, 8+ AI agents. Unifies physical report cards, digital data, Epic notes, and AI interpretation. Council-reviewed and approved.
close_reason: EPIC COMPLETE: All 10 phases shipped - AI-Era CKD Note Template. Deliverables: 37-section schema, 42 clinical cards, Epic SmartPhrase templates, 8 core + 15 specialist AI agents, pre-visit engine, virtual scribe architecture, Renal Performance Clinic protocols. 108 tests passing.

title: UX/UI Overhaul - AI-Era Note Template v2
description: Complete UX/UI redesign: Hybrid ribbon+drawer layout, AI-first section cards with provenance, Baseline/Progression views, Live Filter ambient voice, Pre-Flight Check sign-off, role-based UI (Provider/Scribe/MA), patient-facing view. Council-reviewed design (8.5/10 cohesiveness).

title: Phase 13: Pre-Flight Check Sign-Off
description: Full-page review before closing encounter. AI-generated summary of key findings, plan summary, quick scan grid of all sections, attestation flow. Blocks sign-off on unresolved Critical/Conflict items. Shows modifications from AI suggestions (audit trail).

title: Phase 0: Governance, success metrics, provider focus group
description: Define success metrics (note time, completion rate, GDMT adherence). Define note output contract. Provider focus group review of 37 sections. Start Tier 1 physical performance screening.
close_reason: Completed: governance.md, provider-focus-group.md, tier1-screening-protocol.md all written and committed

title: Phase 4: Core AI Agents (8 agents)
description: Build orchestrator + 7 domain agents: kidney_function, bp_fluid, heart_failure, pharmacotherapy, complications, medication_safety, planning_screening. 50+ test cases per agent.
close_reason: Phase 4 complete: 8 core AI agents + orchestrator implemented

title: Phase 17: Polish, Accessibility & Testing
description: WCAG 2.2 compliance, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, performance optimization, comprehensive test suite, time-to-complete analytics, onboarding flow with nephron metaphor animation, error recovery patterns.

title: Phase 7: Virtual Scribe + OCR Scanning
description: Whisper transcription integration. Extraction pipeline to structured fields. OCR scanning of physical cards. Human verification UI.
close_reason: Phase 7 complete: Virtual Scribe architecture (Whisper transcription, extraction pipeline, OCR scanning, human verification UI) - all TypeScript modules implemented

title: Phase 3: Epic SmartPhrase Template
description: Create new SmartPhrase aligned to section registry. SmartLists for enum fields. SmartLinks for auto-pull. Initial + follow-up versions. Test in sandbox.
close_reason: Phase 3 complete: Epic SmartPhrase TKECKD.txt + TKECKD-INIT.txt + smartlists + migration guide

title: Phase 14: Role-Based UI (Provider/Scribe/MA)
description: Three roles sharing same base UI with role-specific modifications. Provider (blue, full access), Scribe (purple, edit+flag), MA (teal, pre-visit checklist). Accent stripe + text labels + ARIA. Permission system, hand-off workflow, role switcher.

title: Phase 5: Pre-Visit Auto-Population Engine
description: Lab data ingestion, medication list parsing, previous note field extraction. Auto-populate 80%+ of fields. Care gap detection. Pre-visit brief generation.
close_reason: Phase 5 complete: Pre-visit engine with lab ingestion, med parsing, care gaps, previous note extraction

title: Phase 10: Layout Foundation - Hybrid ribbon + drawer + footer
description: Restructure 3-column layout to hybrid ribbon+drawer. ClinicalRibbon (sticky header with Stage/GDMT/alerts), DashboardDrawer (slide-out sheet), NeedsAttention queue, sticky footer with progress bar, CommandPalette (Cmd+K), Baseline/Progression toggle. Mobile responsive.
close_reason: Completed: Phase 10 layout foundation with ClinicalRibbon, NeedsAttention, DashboardDrawer, CommandPalette, App.tsx rewrite, SectionCard state borders, ViewMode rename. 104 tests passing.

title: Phase 2: Digital Note Builder Web App
description: TypeScript + React + Bun web app rendering all 37 sections from JSON schema. Two view modes (Initial/Follow-up Delta). Progressive disclosure. Export to Epic-ready text, patient summary, care team tasks.
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: Digital Note Builder with 3 exports, alerts, 108 tests, responsive mobile

title: Phase 1: Section Registry JSON Schema
description: Create schemas/section-registry.json for all 37 sections. Field types, enum definitions, validation rules. Migration mapping from legacy SmartList IDs. Unit tests.
close_reason: Completed: 4 schema files + 39 validation tests, all passing. 240+ fields, 50+ enums, 8 agents, 23 migrations.

title: Phase 1.5: Paper Prototype Testing
description: Print draft cards for 5-10 priority cards. Conduct 3-5 mock visits with providers. Document feedback. Revise sections based on real-world testing.
close_reason: Phase 1.5 complete: 10 paper prototype cards created for mock visit testing

title: Phase 8: AI Agent Expansion (12-15 agents)
description: Split pharmacotherapy into RAAS/SGLT2i/MRA/GLP1 specialists. Split complications into anemia/MBD/electrolytes. Add nutrition, physical_performance, transplant agents.
close_reason: Phase 8 complete: 15 specialist AI agents (RAAS, SGLT2i, MRA, GLP-1, Lipid, Anemia, MBD, Electrolytes, DM, Gout, Obesity, Nutrition, Physical Performance, Transplant, Dialysis)

title: Phase 16: Live Filter (Ambient Voice)
description: Always-on AI companion during encounters. Per-encounter consent UI, visible recording indicator, mute/pause/scrub controls. Voice extraction pipeline (speech→structured data), real-time dashboard updates, voice corrections. Strike-that scrub command.

title: Phase 11: AI-First Section Cards with Provenance
description: Redesign SectionCard from form-first to AI-first. AI interpretation as primary content, Accept/Edit buttons, draft aesthetic (dashed→solid), ProvenancePopover (hover+dropdown), section states (NeedsReview→AIReady→Accepted→Edited→Critical→Conflict), confidence indicators, conflict detection UI.

title: Phase 12: Delta Mode Redesign + Sparklines
description: Replace yellow/strikethrough deltas with gutter markers (orange=changed, red=critical) + 'was X' muted subtext. Add 'Changed only' toggle in Progression view. Build inline sparkline trend charts for key metrics (eGFR, K+, UACR, BP).
